reviews.review_description: When you join a lobby there’s a bunch of non-toxic kids. But in gorilla tag it’s the opposite. You should definitely join the game it’s worth your time. This is one of my favorite,maybe even my favorite gorilla tag fan game of all time nothings beating a good thunder tag time. Have fun.🤫🧏🏻‍♂️
